So goal setting with the accountability coach, the first one. So let's set this meeting up immediately after you close them. So a 30 to 60 minutes depending on performance. I'm sorry, 30 to 60 minutes depending on preference. If you want to have a 30 minute meeting, if that makes more sense for your setup in your gym, do that if you want to have a 60 minute meeting, which is typically what I prefer if you are able to execute that because it's a little bit more time to really set a good plan. So the coach is going to be making sure that they understand the new meal plan. So it'll be different if they did the 42 a detox that is it's much more of a done for you program versus the six week challenge where they are selecting some of the protein fats and carbs that they're going to be consuming. The coach is really making sure that they understand that. And then secondly, the coach is going to go over to the clipboard and fill out the information that they talked about the goals that are being set their name, all that kind of stuff. So after the close, the salesperson writes their name on the clipboard, but that's it just their name and that kind of just like that kind of delivers part of it. So it's securing that sale. But the coach would actually go over to that clipboard and grab the sheet and then fill out some of the areas which will go over when they have that one on one meeting. So that is how you do that. They just they won't be able to set it up and that happens. So next let's get into the progress tracker. So this is what's going on to your clipboard. And then what the goal dates are reaching that would be. And it doesn't have to be an exact 12 months. Maybe they identify that they want to try to do it in 10 months. So all the rest of these weigh ins would be done on their own. And that sheet's just there to kind of keep them motivated and they'll be able to see other people filling it out as well, which should keep them motivated. Now the next piece would be the Facebook group. So this is just a sample year of change Facebook group. And there is instructions on how to build the Facebook group. You'll be creating a new group and you'll call it like your year of change group and put a cool picture or whatever it may be. And then you'll invite everybody to this group that is doing your year of change program so they can talk with each other about like long term goal setting. It's a little bit different with fast action plans like a six week challenge versus like, hey guys, I'm in month four of 12 and I'm, you know, it's getting tough. What are you guys doing? And that they can build a community and rapport with people that are kind of in the same boat as them. So we will go over how to build that group and best practices for that. The next thing they'll be getting is the 42 day or the six week challenge members portal. And we will go over where those are located and how to modify them for your gym. So it is, they're very similar to each other that obviously the nutrition plans are completely different. So we didn't really need to change the fitness, their accountability because you're already taking care of that. This would be in the event of if they can't make it to the gym and the limited amount of times that that would happen. This fitness and accountability is just perfect for what they'll, they'll, their uses really to nutrition is where it's at. So we'll show you how to download these and how to customize them as well. If you haven't done so already. The, here are some simple tips for easy fulfillment to make it as easy on yourself as possible. After the sale, grab the clipboard and write their name on it. Next you can put them into a text campaign that you send to them right away whenever you want, even if it's a one day delay, maybe you, maybe you put a one day delay on it and a text will go out to them and it gives them the link to schedule their one on one with an accountability coach. If you haven't done that already, they, it will give them the link to that Facebook group and it will give them the link to the members portal. That way you don't have to do all that stuff in person. You can close the sale, make it quick, get onto your next appointment and then that'll hit their phone in about a day or whenever you set the delay to maybe, maybe even later on that day, maybe two hours later and then they'll be able to self register for all that stuff. So that's a pretty simple solution to fulfilling this pretty easily and giving them everything that they need and then they kind of just take it from there. So that's it and you're set.
